title: k-Nearest-Neighbors
snippet: Let’s look at coding up one of the simplest machine learning (ML) algorithms: k-Nearest-Neighbors (kNN). kNN is a supervised ML algorithm that classifies an object based on some distance metric from other labeled objects.
